description: Official news lane plugin manifest (vendor-neutral, provider-instance-backed): the node reads its explicit providerInstanceRef, and the runtime provider layer resolves the instance and invokes the trusted registered news adapter (keyless or header-BYOK per the selected instance's provider) over the instance-configured window. The node contains no vendor logic and no credential access; external provider calls are NOT deterministic.

windowHours.description: Look-back window (hours) for news retrieval; overrides the selected instance's invocation window when present.
